## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Contract Impact

- public API changed? yes / no
- examples changed? yes / no
- docs changed? yes / no
- breaking change? yes / no

If yes, explain clearly.

## Verification

- tests run:
- examples checked:
- manual verification:

## SDK Review Checklist

- [ ] API shape still feels minimal and coherent
- [ ] examples remain clean and natural
- [ ] docs and implementation are aligned
- [ ] tests cover the behavior change
- [ ] no accidental primitive sprawl was introduced
